articles.title: Here’s Why Dogecoin Rallies 40%, Beating Cardano, Shiba Inu
articles.description: Dogecoin emerged as a standout performer this week, knocking out Cardano. DOGE has surged 39.68% from a low of about $0.125 to as high as $0.1746. Meanwhile, its closest rival in the meme space, Shiba Inu, saw a 3.18% gain. In the last few days, Dogecoin (Doge) has emerged as a standout performer, taking the […]
